warp.name: mihu-farm
warp.desc: Mega farm for crops and resources - maintained regularly.

rules.text: Any tool you took from the Player Warp must be returned. Don't log off with the items.
rules.note: Unless you have serious reasons for keeping it

rules.text: In case you don't need the goods, they can be donated on the 9th floor at pw mihu-farm.
Being a discord member of this server is a must, in order to keep track of who is trusted
rules.note: Anyone from this server can promote it to their friends, and may get a reward

rules.text: Don't break anything except the crops and after that replant them always
rules.note: Make sure to use a hoe/item that auto-replants, since it will make your work easier (I have put a Demeters Touch in the basement)
For auto-farms / manual farms / design, make them at plans-suggestions

rules.text: Any donations are welcome; you will be placed on a wall of fame
You will need at least Ranger rank to be verified
rules.note: Mostly because I don't want this farm to be griefed

rules.text: When renting/borrowing an item you must put your head in the barrel
rules.note: Do /hdb search (user) to get yourself your head

rules.text: Copying my builds/property in any way will get you reported to BlossomCraft staff
rules.note: Discord server's template / rules are included
